package rulecoverage

func PositiveRowsIteratedWithoutRowsErrCheck() string {
    ruleID := "rows_iterated_without_rows_err_check"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Rows iterated with Next() but without a visible final Rows.Err() check."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
